data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to confirm the ability to suspend grants without uninstalling the extension, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that demonstrate this capability. The linked use case mentions the need for this functionality, but there is no evidence confirming that grants can be suspended as required, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage. Specifically, the absence of any evidence related to the suspension of grants leads to the conclusion that this requirement is not met.
gaps: No evidence of the ability to suspend grants without uninstalling the extension.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for grant suspension functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ability to suspend grants.
